evals.prompt: I have an idea for a real-time collaboration tool for remote teams. I'm not sure what the best approach is — validate it and figure out the right plan for me.
evals.expected_output: Stage 1: Runs office-hours to validate the idea (demand, status quo, wedge). Stage 2: plan-orchestrator reads the design doc, picks appropriate skills (maybe brainstorm + design-doc + write-plan, or maybe figma-to-code if UI-heavy), generates adaptive execution plan.

evals.prompt: 아이디어 검증하고 알아서 해줘. 사내 재고 관리 시스템을 만들고 싶은데 어떤 스킬 조합이 좋을지 모르겠어.
evals.expected_output: Office-hours validates the inventory management idea. Plan-orchestrator analyzes and recommends skills — likely project-scan + design-doc + write-plan + subagent-dev since it's a CRUD system with DB.

evals.prompt: I already have a validated design doc at docs/specs/chat-system-design.md from a previous office-hours session. Can you skip to the planning phase and figure out the best implementation approach?
evals.expected_output: Skips office-hours (stage marked as skipped). Goes straight to plan-orchestrator which reads the existing design doc and generates an adaptive execution plan.
